ddls:
CREATE TABLE "temperature_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature reading */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the temperature reading */,
  "temp_f" REAL /* Temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "doy_frac" REAL /* Day of the year with fractional part */,
  "doy" INTEGER /* Day of the year */,
  "temp_c" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that recorded the reading */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the sensor is located */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of the reading */,
  "air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Air Quality Index at the time of the reading */,
  "data_validity" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is valid */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code if any */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_readings_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last maintained */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the sensor is located */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact details for the site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the site record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the site record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "validation_name" TEXT /* Name of the validation rule */,
  "validation_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* SQL or script for the validation rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the validation rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the validation rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id")
)
